title: stelis hygrophila
intro: Stelis hygrophila, also known as "Green Gold," is a plant species in the orchid family that has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, providing several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Stelis hygrophila can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
